build.buildCommand: corepack pnpm install && corepack pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=api --filter=discord-bot

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc "case \"$SERVICE_ROLE\" in worker) corepack pnpm --filter api worker ;; bot) corepack pnpm --filter discord-bot start ;; *) corepack pnpm --filter api start ;; esac"
